title: Add register command (POST /register)
description: Add a specter register command for creating new users. Flags: --email, --username, --invite-code. Calls POST /register (no auth required). On success, display the token and generated invite codes.

title: Push sends extra fields (content_hash, revision) not in API spec
description: documents.Collect() sets ContentHash on each Document. When these are sent via POST /sync/:owner/:slug, the request body includes content_hash and revision (as 0) for each document — but the API spec only expects path and content_md. The server likely ignores the extra fields, but the request doesn't match the spec. Fix: either use a separate PushDocument struct with only path/content_md fields, or accept this as harmless. Files: internal/api/types.go (Document struct is shared for push and pull).

title: Add single-document CRUD commands
description: Add client methods and CLI commands for single-document operations: PUT /documents/:owner/:slug/:path (create/update) and DELETE /documents/:owner/:slug/:path. Requires editor role. Could be exposed as specter doc put/delete.

title: Add me command (GET /me)
description: Add a specter me command to show current user info. Calls GET /me with auth. Display id, email, username, and invite codes (with redeemed status).
close_reason: Implemented me command with User type, Me() API method, and cmd/me.go

title: Add invite commands (create + redeem)
description: Add specter invite and specter invite redeem commands. Create: POST /invites with --role flag (editor|reviewer|reader), owner only. Redeem: POST /invites/redeem with --code flag. Needed for multi-user collaboration.
close_reason: Implemented invite create and redeem commands

title: Add projects list command (GET /projects)
description: Add a specter projects command to list projects the user is a member of. Calls GET /projects. Display owner, slug, full_name, name, and role for each project.
close_reason: Implemented projects list command with ListProjects() API method and cmd/projects.go

title: Push command doesn't update sync state after success
description: After a successful push, cmd/push.go never calls syncstate.WriteState(). The push API response (SyncPushResponse) doesn't include synced_at, so the CLI can't update the base_revision timestamp. This means the next push still uses the stale base_revision from the last pull, which can cause false 409 conflicts if another user pushed in between. Fix options: (1) the CLI could do a lightweight pull after push to get a fresh synced_at, or (2) request the API team add synced_at to the push response. Files: cmd/push.go, internal/sync/state.go.
close_reason: Push now updates sync state with synced_at from API response

title: Add document history commands (history list, show revision, diff)
description: API has 3 document-history endpoints with no client methods or CLI commands: (1) GET /document-history/:owner/:slug/:path/history — list revision history with optional branch/limit params, (2) GET /document-history/:owner/:slug/:path/history/:revision — get specific revision content, (3) GET /document-history/:owner/:slug/:path/diff — compare two revisions with from/to params. Need: client methods in internal/api/client.go, response types in types.go, and CLI commands (e.g. specter history <path>, specter history <path> <revision>, specter history diff <path> --from=N --to=N).
close_reason: Added history list, show revision, and diff commands with API client methods

title: Add project delete command (DELETE /projects/:owner/:slug)
description: Add a specter project delete command. Calls DELETE /projects/:owner/:slug. Owner only. Should require confirmation before deleting.
close_reason: Implemented project delete command with confirmation prompt and --force flag

title: Fix minor API inconsistencies
description: Two small fixes: 1) review command maps accept->accepted via string concat (action + "ed") — use an explicit map instead. 2) GetDocument doesn't encode special characters in doc paths — consider segment-by-segment encoding for paths with spaces or special chars.
